'''Seftek''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] located in the [[Vorzyd Cluster]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]].

==Description==
The planet was home to a lost colony of [[Selonian/Legends|Selonians]].

==Sources==
*<!-- 2004-03-24 -->''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' {{1stm}}
